response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of genuine engineering breadth spanning web, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and his current role shows an early pivot into AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands deep, recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy at enterprise scale, and a demonstrated track record advising strategic customers — none of which are substantiated in this resume. The absence of an advanced AI/ML degree, minimal cloud architecture credentials, and no visible thought-leadership or advisory footprint at the scope required for a Director-level IC make this a poor fit despite the candidate's solid foundational engineering career.
strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering experience across diverse stacks (web, embedded, high-throughput systems, mobile), demonstrating genuine technical range
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing a timely and relevant pivot toward agentic AI work
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and a history of open-source contributions and public talks indicates a builder and sharer mindset
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or ML; only a BS in Computer Science — the role strongly prefers a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field
AI and cloud experience is both shallow and recent (~1 year), far below the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products/platforms' the role requires
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive-level stakeholder influence, or thought leadership at the scale expected of a Director-level IC in AI strategy
